name: Newmont Corporation
description: Newmont Corporation is the world's largest gold producer, operating a global portfolio of 11 mines and two joint ventures across the Americas, Africa, Australia, and Papua New Guinea, with proven and probable gold reserves of 92.8 million ounces. The company's primary mining complex is Nevada Gold Mines, a joint venture with Barrick Gold and the world's single largest gold mining operation. Newmont also explores for and produces copper, silver, zinc, and lead as significant byproducts across its diversified asset base.
